positive: An ethereal, Art Nouveau style depiction of the zodiac constellation 'Virgo' (or any chosen sign) integrated into a celestial map. The image should feature stylized gold leaf accents, deep indigo and sapphire blue tones, and mythological figures (like a serene goddess or celestial nymph). The design must incorporate delicate floral elements (lilies, jasmine) and flowing, ornate borders. Style: Art Nouveau poster, mystical, celestial, cosmic, highly detailed, golden glow, volumetric lighting, Alphonse Mucha influence, high contrast, 8k, magazine illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, modern typography, cartoonish, simple, harsh lines, muddy colors
